case_title: 442 POST STREET ASSOCIATES vs. KING, AUTUMM et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT KING, AUTUMM
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT KING, AUTUMM
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES AS TO DEFENDANT KING, AUTUMM

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF 442 POST STREET ASSOCIATES SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR NOV-29-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 08 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON DEC-06-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

DEPT. 8, JUDGE PROVOST, CSR ANA URBINA, CLERK E.MONTI COMPLT FILED: 10-22-93 2:55 PM C/C FOR SETTL CONFERENCE. PLTF COUNSEL, NILS ROSEN- QUEST PRESENT FOR PLTF. DEFT PRESENT IN PRO PER. BOTH PARTIES HAE AGREED TO THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT FOR PLTF: POSS & REST OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 1111 PINE STREET, APT #204. DEFT TO VACATE BY 12-31-93, MIDNIGHT. PLTF WAIVES ALL BACK RENT. IF DEFT DOES NOT VACATE, THEN DEFT TO PAY $3656.00. NO COSTS & NO ATTY FEES. NO FURTHER STAY OF EVICTION. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 442 POST STREET ASSOCIATES AS TO DEFENDANT KING, AUTUMM DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT KING, AUTUMM
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT KING, AUTUMM
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT KING, AUTUMM

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KING, AUTUMM THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1111PINE ST. #204, SF,CA. $3,656.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,656.00, STAYED UNTIL DEC-31-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, RENT/DAMAGES ARE $3656.00. IF DEFT VACATES PREMIES BY MIDNIGHT, 12-31-93, PLTF TO VACATE JUDGMENT. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS, ATTY FEES. NO FURTHER STAYS OF EXECUTION.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT KING, AUTUMM
